check_sql: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE email IS NULL

business_glossary: Status must be in the allowed domain
check_sql: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE status NOT IN ('active','inactive','pending')
SELECT * FROM customers WHERE age < 0 OR age > 120

business_glossary: Active customers must have a country
check_sql: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE country IS NULL

business_glossary: Average age should be stable month-on-month
check_sql: SELECT AVG(age) AS v FROM customers

business_glossary: Intentionally broken check to demonstrate per-check error isolation
check_sql: SELECT * FROM customers WHERE nonexistent_col IS NULL

business_glossary: Every order must reference a customer
check_sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE customer_id IS NULL

business_glossary: Total revenue should be stable month-on-month
check_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS v FROM orders

business_glossary: Order status must be in the allowed domain
check_sql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status NOT IN ('placed','shipped','cancelled','delivered')
